== Notes for [[Item:Q99586|Q99586]] ==

He is credited with a large corpus of Judaic traditions Isra'iliyat, many of which are to be found in al-Tabari's (d.923) commentary on the Qur'an. He participated in the conquest of Syria and Palestine, but died in Medina.

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdullah_ibn_Salam

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7A0A0F1EFBBFA9822EF79916C51E0
geni:6000000017209437140

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
